meaning: Ratio of receiver-estimated horizontal sigma to survey accuracy target. The primary quality indicator. Banded at 1×/2×/5× target.
Whether per-point sigma is available in the device export. False triggers either Scenario 1 (exported subset missing sigma) or Scenario 2 (device truly does not report).
Whether sigma should be exported for this device type. If True but sigma is missing → Scenario 1 (fixable by re-export). If False and sigma is missing → Scenario 2 (device limit, N/A treatment).
Whether antenna height is factory-known for this device type. When True, antenna_height_documented_score = 100 by definition.

formula_expression: |antenna_height_m (form) - antenna_delta_h (device)| within tolerance, when both populated

meaning: Form vs device antenna type consistency.
Form vs device ID match. Provenance check, not accuracy.

formula_expression: device_type supports tilt logging AND tilt_logged_deg IS NOT NULL
meaning: Whether tilt can be verified from device log (vs operator-declarative boolean).
Whether actual NTRIP mountpoint matches project-declared expected mountpoint.

formula_expression: (capture_utc - flight_end_utc) / 3600  -- positive if capture after flight
meaning: Hours between drone flight end and check-point capture. Positive = after flight (preferred).
True if capture occurred before drone flight start.
True if capture occurred during drone flight window.

formula_expression: NOAA SWPC Kp index at capture_utc
meaning: External geomagnetic activity index. KNOWN LIMITATION: Kp under-detects equatorial scintillation (relevant for India). Long-term roadmap: S4/ROTI from regional reference.

formula_expression: device firmware/model exposes L1+L2 carrier phase
meaning: Whether the device captured dual-frequency data — mitigates ionospheric impact.

formula_expression: device_type-aware: CB_X / DGPS / AEROPOINT: completed_normally AND signature valid (if available); OTHER: signature N/A, integrity based on download confirmation
meaning: Whether the capture session terminated cleanly with download confirmed and signature (where applicable) intact.

formula_expression: count of CHECK_POINT-role points where per_point_score > 0
meaning: Number of CP points that survived per-point gates. Drives the conditional severity escalation of CP_FLOAT_ACCEPTED_AS_FIXED.
